title: The Pillars of Software Quality Assurance
description: A flowchart illustrating the interconnected activities and processes that contribute to achieving high software quality throughout the development lifecycle, moving from foundational activities to integrated processes and final validation.
relationships: Quality Planning defines the framework for Quality Control and Assurance
Quality Control activities (testing) feed data into Quality Assurance processes
Quality Assurance uses data to improve overall processes and planning
Validation and feedback loop back to inform and adjust all previous activities
